failures.description: ProductCatalogSearch timed out, leaving the agent without the required catalog evidence to answer whether the item has RAM=8GB.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent correctly understood the task and made the required ProductCatalogSearch call with the provided item_id and product_id. The failure occurred when the tool returned an explicit timeout: CatalogServiceTimeoutError after 30000ms. This is not a malformed invocation, guardrail block, or reasoning error; it is an infrastructure/connectivity-style tool failure. The later steps do not resolve it because no successful retry or alternate evidence is obtained.
